title: Database replication lag on users-db — 182s behind primary
body: Replication lag alert at 07:13 UTC. The users-db read replica is 182 seconds behind the primary (normal: <3s). Read traffic routed to the replica is receiving stale data. Affected read paths: /reports/*, /dashboard/*, /exports/*. Primary write load has increased 136% in the last hour — suspected cause is a large batch job or unoptimised bulk update creating excessive WAL volume. If lag exceeds 900s the read replica will be taken offline automatically, routing all traffic to the primary — this will increase primary load significantly. Customers on the reporting dashboard (Vandelay Industries, Initech) are seeing data that is 182 seconds old.
